# Conveniently located a few minutes walking distance from Hyde Park

A warm welcome to our stylish, vibrant hotel, just a short stroll from Paddington Station and a few minutes from the relaxing calm of Hyde Park.

Located on a quiet, residential street but within walking distance of key transport links, our hotel is the perfect London base, for both business and leisure guests.

## Rooms & Suites

From our comfortable Club Rooms to a spacious Suite, our bedrooms are some of the largest around and provide a peaceful environment to relax in.

## Dining

Enjoy international dishes in our beautifully refurbished restaurant or savour a drink on the outdoor terrace and watch the world go by.

Book A Table

## Afternoon Tea

A quintessential British classic. Our version is inventive and indulgent, with a decadent selection of cakes, including our homemade Cherry Bakewell and famous Coconut Slice, alongside delicate finger sandwiches and of course the iconic scones with clotted cream and jam.

## About Blakemore Hyde Park Hotel

Blakemore Hyde Park Hotel is a Trusted Tagvenue Partner, validated by the Tagvenue team with a record of successful bookings on the platform.

Nestled in West London, in the heart of London's prestigious Bayswater district, the 4 star Blakemore Hyde Park exudes timeless elegance. Housed within a majestic grand white Victorian edifice, this upscale venue is moment’s away from Hyde Park, Kensington Palace, The Royal Albert Hall and Lancaster Gate. There is a choice of three tube lines all 10-minute walk away - Queensway, Bayswater and Notting Hill. The nearest overground train station is Paddington approximately 15 minute's walk away. The transport links are all within reach for exploring London’s tourist attractions including the West End, Oxford Street and museums. The private meeting room can accommodate up to six attendees on a round table, making it an ideal place for those small-scale, intimate meeting sessions. The tastefully decorated, contemporary room is filled with daylight. Attendees can take advantage of the surroundings after their meetings and relax in The Terrace Restaurant & Bar which has its own outdoor terrace, a true gem for a London venue. The restaurant serves international cuisine, afternoon tea and is perfect for Christmas lunches and dinners.

# lovely hotel, shame about the noise
Review of[Blakemore Hyde Park](https://www.tripadvisor.co.uk/Hotel_Review-g186338-d192095-Reviews-Blakemore_Hyde_Park-London_England.html)
4.0 of 5 bubblesReviewed8 Jan 2020
I stayed here for two nights before Christmas for mine and my partners yearly London Christmas trip. upon arriving we quickly noticed how beautiful this hotel is, very classy elegant lobby. We checked in and had the set lunch menu in the bar area as our room wasn't ready for another half an hour, Deborah served us on both the day of arrival and the following day when we also had lunch, and she is AMAZING they no longer do the calamari only fresh squid, so i opted for the soup starter on day one, however on day two she put in a special request and surprised me with the calamari i had been craving! she is super friendly and hardworking, she is a credit to this hotel. Once we had got to our room we were happy with the size of the room and the style, however we noticed the windows were open meaning the room was ice cold, after about 10 minuets of being in the room we noticed loud banging an drilling from above/next to our room, i told my partner we would leave it for the time being as it will probably stop soon being almost 5pm, by time we had gotten back to our room after an evening out it had stopped luckily! however i became sick that evening and wanted to sleep in on the friday morning, however the loud building work started again, meaning i had no option but to get up as it was impossible to block out, i was frustrated so had a small breakfast from the hotel which was fine no complaints there, and went out. in general this is a lovely hotel with great staff and rooms, however i didn't see anywhere from their Facebook page, to booking.com, to their website, about any building work going on at the hotel, if i knew this was the case i would have even paid extra for a quiet noise due to being chronically ill. I had seen a few comments on trip advisor upon my return but that was all. I would recommend this hotel to people, but i would check about any building work when arriving or booking.
MoreDate of stay:December 2019
Room Tip:Ask about any building work going on and request a quiet room!

Overview

Located only 500 metres from Queensway underground station, Blakemore Hyde Park London hotel features 138 modern rooms with all necessary amenities. This convenient hotel also offers Wi-Fi throughout the property.

The Blakemore Hyde Park includes a restaurant that is open for a continental breakfast. The à la carte Terrace Restarant restaurant welcomes guests with British dishes. There is a lounge bar on site. You can visit a restaurant situated close by and taste French cuisine.

The scientifically spellbinding Science Museum is 5 minutes away by car, while Victoria and Albert Museum is 10 minutes by car from the accommodation. History lovers will enjoy visiting Buckingham Palace (2.8 km) and the royal residence "Kensington Palace" (0.8 km).

This 4-star hotel allows you to enjoy such natural sights as The Long Water approximately 500 metres away. The contemporary Blakemore Hyde Park hotel is ideally located in close proximity to Bayswater.

The rooms are equipped with coffee and tea making facilities, along with a flat-screen TV with satellite channels for guests' comfort. They are furnished with bespoke furniture featuring a sofa set. Offering hair dryers and shower caps, the bathrooms also feature a separate toilet and a shower.

The nearest underground station is about a 10-minute stroll away.

The Blakemore Hyde Park London also includes a fitness room, fitness classes, a leisure centre, and a terrace. There is a conference room available for corporate travellers.

# Conveniently located a few minutes walking distance from Hyde Park

A warm welcome to our stylish, vibrant hotel, just a short stroll from Paddington Station and a few minutes from the relaxing calm of Hyde Park.

Located on a quiet, residential street but within walking distance of key transport links, our hotel is the perfect London base, for both business and leisure guests.

## Rooms & Suites

From our comfortable Club Rooms to a spacious Suite, our bedrooms are some of the largest around and provide a peaceful environment to relax in.

## Dining

Enjoy international dishes in our beautifully refurbished restaurant or savour a drink on the outdoor terrace and watch the world go by.

Book A Table

## Afternoon Tea

A quintessential British classic. Our version is inventive and indulgent, with a decadent selection of cakes, including our homemade Cherry Bakewell and famous Coconut Slice, alongside delicate finger sandwiches and of course the iconic scones with clotted cream and jam.

Kings Guard Afternoon Tea Book A Table

## Meetings & Events

At The Blakemore Hyde Park Hotel we are dedicated to helping you plan and execute a seamless corporate meeting or private event.
